title: Overlord
sourceNotes: Cumulative episodes across S1 (13) + S2 (13, eps 14-26) + S3 (13, eps 27-39) + S4 (13, eps 40-52) = 52 total. Paired with the Satoshi Ōshio manga adaptation (83 ch). Both anime and manga adapt the same Kugane Maruyama light novel. Per-arc chapter boundaries approximate.

mappings.arc: The Undead King (S1: Carne Village / E-Rantel)
The Bloody Valkyrie (S3: Carne Defense / Jaldabaoth)
The Ruler of Conspiracy (S4: Holy Kingdom / Re-Estize Invasion)

movies.title: Overlord: The Sacred Kingdom
movies.note: Canon film adapting the Holy Kingdom arc (LN vols 12-13).
